title: Franky Chooses a Direct Fight
description: Pages 11–15 focus on franky chooses a direct fight, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: showing this sort of foolishness to the public is an act unfit for this line of kings!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You'll be the laughingstock of the world!! Please stop that!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: This is no jest or jape! If need be, I will prove it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...by cutting off my own hands and feet!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: In case all goes awry....!! At least I'll bring down that Dofla- Mingo....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll leave it to you to request aid from other nations and deal with the aftermath!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We have to get that money, no matter what.....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Hurry up, everyone!! Just as the King said!!! Gather up all your money!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Our kindly King Riku would never make such a request with malice in his heart!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: This is no small thing, so there Mu- St be a reason!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Let's bring all our money here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: This is the virtue... of our King...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: This is the trust built by the Riku family over 800 years:

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: What an amazing country!!! Surely we'll be saved!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: We humbly borrow this from you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: Bring all the wealth of the nation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Squad Captain Tank! In Sevio, the King is...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: My liege, you needn't have come here yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: King Riku!! We don't know why this is happen- ing, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: King Riku, please stop this!!! Did we do something wrong!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: Out of the way!!! Don't come near me!! Get away from me!!!

summary: Franky Chooses a Direct Fight focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as the Toy Soldier pushes the rescue plan forward while the alliance tries to reach Sugar and expose Dressrosa's hidden system.
